Claude Now Works While You Sleep! New Scheduled Tasks Update

Anthropic just dropped a massive update for Claude Code that allows you to schedule tasks and run AI agents on autopilot. Learn how to set up automated bug fixes, code reviews, and daily reports so Claude works even while you're away. This shift to autonomous development is a game-changer for every developer and team.
